title: MrCrayon's Gunpowder Recipe
description: This is my first mod, this mod will make gunpowder production way more easier by adding a crafting recipe to a gunpowder!
body: **This is my first mod, this mod will make gunpowder production way more easier by adding a crafting recipe to a gunpowder! Mod adding Sulfur and Saltpeter that is used in gunpowder recipe. Mod not adding much. Mod made for making it easier to get gunpowder if needed**
